title: ModularWarfare-Shining
description: Guns, Armor, Backpacks, Modification, Better HitBox, More parameters for Attachment.
body: ## Join Discord for Dev Version(Weekly updates) [Newest Update Video](https://youtu.be/Mu2ThvLMS2I) >Since version 2.4.4f, mcgltf will no longer be used as a dependency. >Please note downloading new dependencies[Hegltf is within the mod] >Dependency: > >jackson-libs: In the download page, don't miss it > >joml: In the download page, don't miss it > >Nashorn: In the download page, don't miss it ZH ModularWarfare-Shining (模块化武装：烨熠) 是一款专为1.12.2Minecraft打造的军事武装MOD。基于本MOD，您无需任何MOD开发能力而只需要创建或使用内容包（Context-Pack）即可将众多军事武装属性加入游戏，诸如枪械、配件、弹药、护甲和背包等属性。 ModularWarfare是ModularWarfare-Shining的前身和基础，由[Protoxy](https://github.com/Protoxy22)开发。ModularWarfare-Shining则是ModularWarfare的分支增强版本，提供了一些增强性的功能，比如支持多语言、更现代的模块化。 感谢[Protoxy](https://github.com/Protoxy22)长期以来对MCMOD社区的不懈努力与无私耕耘。 新加密系统已经上线，旧的加密包将不再支持。如果有需要请联系我的Discord:siz_stan [新手臂护甲渲染设置文档ZH](https://shimo.im/docs/913JM8DY9gF6EpAE) EN ModularWarfare-Shining is a military armed MOD specifically designed for 1.12.2 Minecraft. Based on this MOD, you do not need any MOD development capabilities and only need to create or use a Context-Pack to add numerous military armed attributes to the game, such as guns, attachments, ammunition, armor, and backpacks. ModularWarfare Shining is a continuation of ModularWarfare who have been orginally developed by [Protoxy](https://github.com/Protoxy22 ). ModularWarfare-Shining is a branch enhanced version of ModularWarfare, providing some enhanced features, such as support for multiple languages and more modern modularity. Thanks [Protoxy](https://github.com/Protoxy22) for long term unremitting efforts and selfless cultivation of the Minecraft MOD community. [New Arm Armor Tutorial Document EN](https://shimo.im/docs/loqeMD8pjpfVYRqn) Tips: 1. ''without-movements'' means not include modularmovements. 2. New encryption system is online, the old encryption pack is no longer supported. If you need anything, please contact my Discord: siz_stan [![License: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-CC%20BY--NC--SA%204.0-lightgrey.svg)](http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/) [![License: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0](https://licensebuttons.net/l/by-nc-sa/4.0/80x15.png)](http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/) Important for content-pack creators: - `F9` to reload .obj models + render.json files - `F10`+ `SNEAK` to reload only configurations json - `F9`+ `SNEAK` to reload the resource-packs (sounds, textures, items) Links（not shining edition）: * Wiki: [https://modularwarfare.com/docs/](https://modularwarfare.com/docs/) * Website/Forum: [https://modularwarfare.com](https://modularwarfare.com/) * ModularWarfare Discord: [https://discord.gg/TtzsDXwx9M](https://discord.gg/TtzsDXwx9M) Credits（not shining edition）: * Addon-loader (MIT Licence): https://github.com/Timardo/ContentCreator * ModularWarfare: https://github.com/ModularMods/ModularWarfare
